headline: SOUTHWEST AIRLINES BEGINS INTERLINE PARTNERSHIP WITH SINGAPORE AIRLINES
summary: Southwest Airlines Co. (NYSE: LUV) and Singapore Airlines (SIA) have partnered to offer travelers around the globe single-ticket journeys to and from the United States, connecting to places where Southwest and Singapore Airlines fly. Southwest Executives shared the news of the interline partnership during the International Air Transport Association (IATA) Annual General Meeting in Brazil.

raw.headline: SOUTHWEST AIRLINES BEGINS INTERLINE PARTNERSHIP WITH SINGAPORE AIRLINES

headline: SAY WOW TO DISCOUNT TRAVEL: SOUTHWEST AIRLINES DELIVERS WEEK OF DEALS ON FLIGHTS, HOTELS, CARS, AND VACATIONS
summary: Southwest Airlines Co. (NYSE: LUV) launches the Week of WOW, one of the carrier's biggest sales of the year. Starting today through June 11, Customers can save up to 40% off base fares using code FLYWOW for flights from Aug. 4 to Dec.16, 2026,1 along with promotions on hotels, rental cars, cruises, and Getaways by Southwest™ vacation packages. Check out some of the nonstop routes on sale now available on Southwest.com®, with one-way as low as 40% off between:

headline: Delta and Other Airline Stocks Are Under Pressure After a Sector-Wide Profit Warning
summary: Rising oil prices and a sector-wide profit warning had hit the stocks hard in premarket trading but they quickly fought back after Iran said it has ended its strikes toward Israel.  Delta Air Lines  was down 0.7% in early trading, while  United Airlines  was down 1.4% after initially falling close to 3% before the open.  When it comes to airlines, investors are digesting a warning from the International Air Transport Association.

headline: Why Delta and Other Airline Stocks Are Shrugging Off a Sector-Wide Profit Warning
summary: Rising oil prices and a sector-wide profit warning had hit the stocks initially but they quickly fought back after Iran said it has ended its strikes toward Israel.  Delta Air Lines  was up 0.4% ahead of the open, while  United Airlines  was down just 0.5% after initially falling close to 3%.  When it comes to airlines, investors are digesting a warning from the International Air Transport Association.

headline: Stock Index Futures Climb as Tech Stocks Rebound, U.S. Inflation Data and SpaceX IPO Awaited
summary: June S&P 500 E-Mini futures (ESM26) are up +0.71%, and June Nasdaq 100 E-Mini futures (NQM26) are up +1.40% this morning, signaling a rebound from Friday’s selloff on Wall Street as investors stepped in to buy the dip in technology stocks even as tensions in the Middle East pushed oil prices higher.

headline: DAL, UAL, AAL, LUV Stocks Slip Overnight: IATA Halves 2026 Airline Profit Outlook, Sounds Alarm On Fuel Costs
summary: IATA said higher fuel prices and disruptions from the Middle East conflict are likely to hurt airline profits.
